prompt: A ClinicOps Reconciliation & Exam Package Platform for multi-location preventive care clinics, enabling configurable physical exam packages, accurate billing, and full-cycle tracking from patient intake to financial reconciliation and reporting. The system operates offline on a local network and supports role-based access including System Administrator, Clinic Manager (tenant owner), Front Desk, Finance Specialist, and Read-Only Auditor. The React-based interface is optimized for desktop and tablet use, offering fast no-refresh interactions, inline validation, pagination, and advanced search with filters such as keyword, category, price/deposit range, availability, and clinic-defined distance using offline ZIP centroid mapping. Front Desk users can save favorites, access recent search history, and receive lightweight recommendations based on prior bookings and demographic relevance. Clinic Managers maintain exam catalogs with reference ranges, units, contraindications, and applicability rules, while package composition supports required/optional items, validity windows, and versioning to preserve historical accuracy. Billing supports memberships, services, and bundled pricing with versioned strategies and effective dates, calculating invoices with discounts and configurable tax. Bulk operations allow mass updates with a 10-minute rollback window for non-financial changes. The backend exposes REST APIs via Express, with MongoDB storing tenants, users, exam catalogs, packages, orders, invoices, and reconciliation data. Authentication is offline with strong password policies, bcrypt hashing, and lockout mechanisms. Optional OAuth integration is adapter-based and disabled offline. Reconciliation ingests CSV/Excel or internal API feeds, prevents duplicate imports via fingerprinting, and auto-matches transactions using amount, time window, counterparty, and memo similarity, generating exception workflows for manual resolution. The system includes KPI dashboards, CSV export, strict tenant isolation, and tamper-evident audit logs. Sensitive data is masked in the UI and encrypted at rest using AES-256 with locally stored keys.
database: MongoDB (local deployment with AES-256 encrypted sensitive fields)
